languages.text: {n}Растрепанный мужчина лет сорока сплевывает кровавую слюну и морщится, оправляя иссеченную броню.{/n} "Ваша Светлость! Не успел поблагодарить вас за спасение. Губернатор Куравич, готов служить династии".
languages.translation_comment: Губернатором был ноунейм Куравич и он спасен в бою
Губернатором был ноунейм Куравич и он спасен в бою

languages.text: {n}A ragged man in his forties spits a mouthful of blood and scowls while fixing his mangled armour.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I didn't get the chance to thank you for saving me. Colonel-Governor Kuravich, ready to serve the dynasty."
languages.original_text: {n}Растрепанный мужчина лет сорока сплевывает кровавую слюну и морщится, оправляя иссеченную броню.{/n} "Ваша Светлость! Не успел поблагодарить вас за спасение. Губернатор Куравич, готов служить династии".

traits.locale_text: {n}A ragged man in his forties spits a mouthful of blood and scowls while fixing his mangled armour.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I did not have the chance to thank you for saving me. Governor Kuravich, ready to serve the dynasty."

{n}A ragged man in his forties spits a mouthful of blood and scowls while fixing his mangled armour.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I did not have the chance to thank you for saving me. Governor Kuravich, ready to serve the dynasty."

{n}A ragged man in his forties spits a mouthful of blood and scowls while fixing his mangled armour.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I didn't get the chance to thank you for saving me. Colonel-Governor Kuravich, ready to serve the dynasty."

{n}A ragged man in his forties spits a mouthful of blood and scowls while fixing his mangled armour.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I didn't get the chance to thank you for saving me. Colonel-Governor Kuravich, ready to serve the dynasty."

languages.text: {n}一个四十多岁、衣衫褴褛的男人啐出一口血，皱着眉头修理着自己破烂的护甲。{/n}“大人！还没来得及感谢您救了我的命。我是总督上校库拉维奇，随时准备为王朝效力。”
languages.original_text: {n}A ragged man in his forties spits a mouthful of blood and scowls while fixing his mangled armour.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I didn't get the chance to thank you for saving me. Colonel-Governor Kuravich, ready to serve the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: {n}一个四十多岁、衣衫褴褛的男人啐出一口血，皱着眉头修理着自己破烂的护甲。{/n}“大人！还没来得及感谢您救了我的命。我是总督上校库拉维奇，随时准备为王朝效力。”

languages.text: {n}Kırklarındaki pejmürde bir adam, ağız dolusu kan tükürüyor ve parçalanmış zırhını düzeltirken kaşlarını çatıyor.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Beni kurtardığınız için teşekkür etme fırsatım olmamıştı. Vali Albay Kuravich, hanedanlığa hizmet etmeye hazırdır."
languages.original_text: {n}A ragged man in his forties spits a mouthful of blood and scowls while fixing his mangled armour.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I didn't get the chance to thank you for saving me. Colonel-Governor Kuravich, ready to serve the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: {n}Kırklarındaki pejmürde bir adam, ağız dolusu kan tükürüyor ve parçalanmış zırhını düzeltirken kaşlarını çatıyor.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Beni kurtardığınız için teşekkür etme fırsatım olmamıştı. Vali Albay Kuravich, hanedanlığa hizmet etmeye hazırdır."

languages.text: {n}Un homme dépenaillé d'une quarantaine d'années crache du sang et fronce les sourcils en réparant son armure endommagée.{/n} « Votre Seigneurie ! Je n'ai pas encore eu l'occasion de vous remercier de m'avoir sauvé. Colonel-gouverneur Kuravich, prêt à servir la dynastie. »
languages.original_text: {n}A ragged man in his forties spits a mouthful of blood and scowls while fixing his mangled armour.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I didn't get the chance to thank you for saving me. Colonel-Governor Kuravich, ready to serve the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: {n}Un homme dépenaillé d'une quarantaine d'années crache du sang et fronce les sourcils en réparant son armure endommagée.{/n} « Votre Seigneurie ! Je n'ai pas encore eu l'occasion de vous remercier de m'avoir sauvé. Colonel-gouverneur Kuravich, prêt à servir la dynastie. »

languages.text: {n}Un hombre agotado de unos cuarenta años escupe un puñado de sangre y frunce el ceño mientras arregla su armadura destrozada.{/n} «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}! No he tenido la oportunidad de darle las gracias por salvarme. Coronel gobernador Kuravich, listo para servir a la dinastía».
languages.original_text: {n}A ragged man in his forties spits a mouthful of blood and scowls while fixing his mangled armour.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I didn't get the chance to thank you for saving me. Colonel-Governor Kuravich, ready to serve the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: {n}Un hombre agotado de unos cuarenta años escupe un puñado de sangre y frunce el ceño mientras arregla su armadura destrozada.{/n} «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}! No he tenido la oportunidad de darle las gracias por salvarme. Coronel gobernador Kuravich, listo para servir a la dinastía».

languages.text: {n}Ein ungepflegter Mann in seinen Vierzigern spuckt mit mürrischem Gesicht etwas Blut aus, während er seine verbeulte Rüstung repariert.{/n} "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Ich hatte noch keine Gelegenheit, Euch für meine Rettung zu danken. Colonel-Governor Kuravich, bereit, der Dynastie zu dienen."
languages.original_text: {n}A ragged man in his forties spits a mouthful of blood and scowls while fixing his mangled armour.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I didn't get the chance to thank you for saving me. Colonel-Governor Kuravich, ready to serve the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ein ungepflegter Mann in seinen Vierzigern spuckt mit mürrischem Gesicht etwas Blut aus, während er seine verbeulte Rüstung repariert.{/n} "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Ich hatte noch keine Gelegenheit, Euch für meine Rettung zu danken. Colonel-Governor Kuravich, bereit, der Dynastie zu dienen."

languages.text: {n}40代、傷だらけの男が口から血を吐き、鎧を直しながら怒り心頭。{/n}「お、お殿様様！助けていただいたのに、お礼が言えませんでした。クラヴィチ大佐、王朝に仕える準備は万端です。」
languages.original_text: {n}A ragged man in his forties spits a mouthful of blood and scowls while fixing his mangled armour.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I didn't get the chance to thank you for saving me. Colonel-Governor Kuravich, ready to serve the dynasty."
